case_title: RICHARD B MARCHASIN et al VS. CYRENE R WAGONER et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARCHASIN, RICHARD B MARCHASIN, AMELIA ELIZABETH ROSEBLUETH, STEPHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAGONER, CYRENE R SOLORZANO, AIMEE L ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1750 MISSION STREET #45, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES
